title: Implement scan QR replay hardening
description: Execute plan docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-23-scan-qr-replay-hardening.md: itemCount cap, 5-min approver session, per-(student,session) award cap, mode-default fix, pointedItems response field, UI hint, manual e2e.
close_reason: 7 code tasks implemented; spec+quality reviewed READY_TO_SHIP. Task 8 (manual e2e in LIFF) deferred to user.

title: Manual e2e: admin user CRUD + /home admin tile
description: Plan Task 8 from docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-24-admin-user-crud.md. Run 12 manual scenarios on staging/preview: admin tile visibility, edit fullName/class/totalPoints, destructive confirm modals, status flip enforcement (inactive user blocked from auth), teacher/admin/self edit rejection, concurrent edits, userEdits audit entries.

title: Manual e2e: teacher promote council + non-student preview scan
description: Plan Task 8 from docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-24-teacher-promote-council-no-points.md. Run all 10 manual scenarios on staging/preview deploy before declaring feature live. Includes promote/demote, self-change rejection, council preview scan, leaderboard exclusion.

title: Validate image size before blob put
description: storage.ts uploadScanImage accepts any size. Add max byte check (e.g. 5MB) before put() to prevent abuse/cost runaway.

title: Parallelize or merge sevenDaySeries queries
description: src/server/teacher/students.ts:9 runs 7 sequential Firestore queries per profile. Replace with single ranged query (where localDate >= 7daysAgo) + client groupBy, or Promise.all parallel aggregates.

title: Add blob del() on scan deletion paths
description: No del() in src/server/scan/storage.ts. Orphan blobs accumulate when scans deleted (admin/teacher delete flows). Find delete endpoints, delete blob alongside Firestore doc.
close_reason: No scan delete paths exist yet. Helper deleteScanImage added to storage.ts for future delete flows.

title: Cap teacher export date range + add safety limit
description: src/app/api/v1/teacher/exports/sheet/route.ts:70 has no limit on scans query. Cap date range to 90d, add .limit(10000) safety net, and batch profile fetches instead of sequential getUser per uid.

title: Use AggregateField.sum in getKPIs student loop
description: src/server/teacher/kpis.ts:15 reads every student doc to sum totalPoints. Replace with collection-level aggregate sum like line 36 already does for totalBottles.

title: Audit Vercel Blob usage
description: Scan for blob put/del/list/get calls. Check access mode (public/private), cleanup paths, orphan handling, and size limits.
notes: Only put used. Findings: no del() anywhere (orphan growth on scan delete), no size cap before put, access:public + no signed URLs, httpsUrl is dead pass-through post-GCS migration.
close_reason: Audit complete, findings reported. Follow-up tickets needed for individual fixes.

title: Audit Firestore query cost (pagination/limits)
description: Scan all .collection() queries for missing limit/pagination, full scans, and N+1 patterns. Report hotspots.
notes: Hotspots: teacher/exports/sheet (no limit, N+1 getUser), kpis student loop (use AggregateField.sum), sevenDaySeries 7 sequential queries, classes full scan, roleRequests pending unbounded. Properly paginated: listMyScans, leaderboard, admin-list, role-changes.
close_reason: Audit complete, findings reported. Follow-up tickets needed for individual fixes.

title: Audit/migrate Firestore scans with gs:// imagePath
description:
Query scans collection for documents where imagePath starts with gs://. Three options per row:
1. Migrate: re-upload image to Vercel Blob, update imagePath to blob URL.
2. Delete: drop scan record (and orphaned image) if user-acceptable.
3. Leave: keep with broken image until row aged out.

Decide policy first. Once zero gs:// rows remain, unblocks dropping legacy fallback (botty-9ot).

Reference: src/server/scan/storage.ts:19-26 legacy branch.
notes:
Audit script written: scripts/audit-gs-paths.mjs. Default dry-run prints count + sample. Flags --delete or --migrate.

Blocked: vercel env pull returns empty for GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON (Vercel masks secrets). User must paste creds into .env.local then run:
  node --env-file=.env.local scripts/audit-gs-paths.mjs

--migrate path not viable since old GCS bucket has billing disabled (image bytes unreachable). Effective options: --delete legacy rows, or leave them (httpsUrl fallback shows broken thumbs).
close_reason: Deleted 18 legacy gs:// scan rows (2026-05-17 to 2026-05-20). Verified zero remain. Points already in user totals untouched. Unblocks botty-9ot.

title: Drop dead GCS_BUCKET env var
description:
Env var GCS_BUCKET no longer read by any code after Vercel Blob migration (commit ef2da57). Remove from Vercel project env + docs.

Keep: GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON, GCP_PROJECT — still used by Firebase Admin + Sheets API.
close_reason: Removed GCS_BUCKET from Vercel production env via vercel env rm. Preview env already had no such var (env_not_found). Code already clean. Historical mention in docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-06-line-auth-sdk-design.md:94 left as snapshot.

title: Rename gcsPath -> imageUrl in scan upload route
description:
Variable name leftover from GCS migration. Now holds Vercel Blob URL. Misleading name only — no behavior change.

File: src/app/api/v1/scan/upload/route.ts:130-192
Rename local var gcsPath to imageUrl (or blobUrl).
close_reason: Renamed gcsPath -> imageUrl in src/app/api/v1/scan/upload/route.ts. Also updated console.error label from 'gcs upload error' to 'blob upload error'. Typecheck + 115 tests pass.

title: Admin edit confirm modal: show field-specific old→new
description: src/app/admin/page.tsx confirm modal text is generic. Spec §3.3 requires modal to name each changed field and show old→new value. Low-severity UX polish from final review.

title: Surface userEdits in /admin audit tab
description: Task 1 (commit 99c8bcb) writes userEdits/<id> audit docs but the existing /admin audit tab only reads roleChanges + adjustments. Add a reader for userEdits and merge into the audit timeline. Out-of-scope flagged in plan section 'spec coverage gaps'.

title: Admin role-change route also leaks raw error in 500 body
description: src/app/api/v1/admin/users/[uid]/role/route.ts has the same info-leak pattern we fixed for the teacher route (commit 007e317). Replace 'return jsonError(500, msg)' with 'return jsonError(500, internal)'. Same fix applied to teacher route. Also consider uid format check + body field normalisation for parity.

title: Tighten changeRoleAsTeacher target guard to allowlist
description: src/server/user/role-change.ts:78 uses denylist (current === teacher || admin). Future unknown role string would slip past. Switch to allowlist: if (current !== 'student' && current !== 'council') throw forbidden_target. From Task 1 code review.

title: Cap unbounded queries: classes.get, roleRequests pending
description: src/server/classes/repo.ts:16 full collection scan no limit. src/server/roleRequests/repo.ts:87 pending requests no limit. Both fine for small N but add safety limits.

title: Drop dead httpsUrl wrapper post-GCS migration
description: src/server/scan/storage.ts:17 httpsUrl is pass-through after gs:// removal (commit 609ecb4). Inline at callers or delete wrapper.

title: Drop legacy gs:// branch in storage.httpsUrl
description:
Legacy fallback for old DB rows with gs://bucket/path image paths from pre-Vercel-Blob era.

File: src/server/scan/storage.ts:19-26
Also drop storage.googleapis.com + firebasestorage.googleapis.com from next.config.ts CSP img-src + image hostnames.

Blocker: confirm no scan rows in Firestore still have gs:// paths. Query scans collection for imagePath starting with gs://. Migrate or delete first.
close_reason: Dropped gs:// branch from httpsUrl() in src/server/scan/storage.ts (now identity pass-through). Removed storage.googleapis.com + firebasestorage.googleapis.com from next.config.ts CSP img-src + remotePatterns. Added *.public.blob.vercel-storage.com instead. 115 tests pass.
